name: Ascendance of a Bookworm
description:
From the anime Ascendance of a Bookworm: I'll stop at Nothing to Become a Librarian

I couldn't find any existing bots for it so I created my own, I only inserted information up to season 3 minus the part where Myne gets adopted. This bot will focus on scenarios taking place late into Myne's life at the church, before the whole noble of another domain comes to take Dirk away thing.

There could be missing information so hopefully you can feed the character information in your chats yourself.
creator: 1Calista1
